source.title: Turn on a source
source.hint: easiest start — Players, they need no setup

interceptOnly.label: Intercept only
interceptOnly.hint: events are logged but not sent to MyShows
interceptOnly.lockedHint: set via CLI flag, restart server to change

player.subtitle: VLC, MPC, mpv and others on this computer
player.hint: Detects VLC, MPV, MPC, IINA, Infuse, QuickTime and Windows Media Player apps running on the same machine. On macOS, exact position/duration is read directly from VLC and QuickTime via AppleScript; other players fall back to a bundled `ffprobe` and process-uptime estimation.

stremio.subtitle: api.strem.io · cloud library
stremio.hint: Paste your Stremio authKey from the web.stremio.com browser console: JSON.parse(localStorage.profile).auth.key. Playback from every Stremio client (web, desktop, mobile, TV) is picked up.

errorByCode.auth: Invalid token — check that you copied the entire value
errorByCode.network: Server isn't responding — check that it's running and reachable
errorByCode.unreachable: Can't reach the server at this address

status.idle: enable the source to check it

failed.pms-not-installed: no local Plex Media Server found
failed.permission-denied: no access to the player's settings
failed.not-signed-in: Plex Media Server isn't signed in to plex.tv
failed.parse-error: could not read the player's settings
failed.kodi-not-installed: Kodi isn't installed on this machine
failed.webserver-disabled: Kodi's web interface is off (Settings → Services → Control)

quickConnect.instruction: Open {source} in a browser (the server's web UI) → your avatar → Quick Connect → enter the code:

failed.disabled: Quick Connect is disabled on the server (Dashboard → Quick Connect)

setup.title: Player Setup
setup.subtitle: Enable a player's local API so MyShows can read exact position

modal.title: Enable {name}?
modal.intro: These settings will be changed. This is reversible — you can Disable it later.

result.restart: Restart the player for the change to take effect.
result.verified: Connected — the player's API is reachable.
result.applied: Applied. Restart the player, then it will connect.
result.restored: Disabled and restored to the previous setting.
result.forceRestored: Disabled. The previous values were not saved — the player's settings were reset to defaults.

vlc-http-interface.description: Enables VLC's HTTP API (port 8080) for exact position and state tracking. Adds extraintf=http to the [core] section and a generated password to the [lua] section of vlcrc (Windows: %APPDATA%\vlc\vlcrc; macOS: ~/Library/Preferences/org.videolan.vlc/vlcrc; Linux: ~/.config/vlc/vlcrc). The adapter reads the password straight from vlcrc — no need to copy it anywhere. Reversible.

mpv-ipc.description: Enables mpv's JSON IPC for exact position and state tracking. Appends an `input-ipc-server=<socket>` line to mpv.conf. mpv must be restarted for the change to take effect. Reversible.

iina-ipc.description: Enables the JSON IPC of IINA's built-in mpv for exact position, pause and seek tracking. Writes `input-ipc-server=<socket>` into IINA's settings (Advanced → mpv options). IINA must be closed before applying and reopened afterwards. Reversible.

mpc-hc-web-interface.description: Enables MPC-HC's HTTP API (port 13579) for exact position and state tracking. Writes EnableWebServer=1 and WebServerPort=13579 to HKCU\Software\MPC-HC\MPC-HC\Settings. Reversible.

mpc-be-web-interface.description: Enables MPC-BE's HTTP API (port 13579) for exact position and state tracking. Writes EnableWebServer=1 and Port=13579 to HKCU\Software\MPC-BE\WebServer. Reversible.

reason.player-running: Close {name} before changing settings — otherwise it may overwrite our changes on exit. Reopen it afterwards.

events.title: Events
events.empty: No events yet — events will appear here as they happen

editor.title: Edit config
editor.hint: Full config as JSON. Saving overwrites the config file, validates myshows_url and reloads sources. For advanced setup.

errors.backendUnavailable: Scrobbler backend is unavailable on port {port}
